notes: Wald mean-coefficient intervals calibrated (finite-rate 1.0, near-nominal incl. low-count stress) — docs/dev-log/simulation-artifacts/2026-07-09-nongaussian-unstructured-coverage-pilot

drm_validate_reml_spec() aborts REML=TRUE for any model_type != gaussian/biv_gaussian with "REML is implemented only for univariate and bivariate Gaussian models." Confirmed as an expected-rejection gate in the estimator-surface-conformance registry.

count~x+(1|id). Converges, pdHess TRUE, id-level BLUPs correlate >0.45 with simulated truth, sd(mu) within 0.25 of true SD. profile_targets() reports profile_ready=TRUE for the SD (log_sd_mu) but no confint()/profile() test exercises it for this family, so interval evidence is not claimed for this row.
Same blanket non-Gaussian REML gate as the fixed-effect row; random-intercept Poisson is still model_type "poisson", not gaussian/biv_gaussian.
count~x+(0+x|id), unlabelled independent slope only. Converges, pdHess TRUE, slope BLUPs correlate >0.35 with truth. This is the ONLY ordinary-slope form implemented; see next row.

evidence_source: R/drmTMB.R:7215-7231 (only term$type %in% c("intercept","slope") with covariance_label NULL admitted); tests/testthat/test-poisson-mean.R:617-632 (error text "Only independent Poisson")
notes: Correlated intercept+slope blocks (1+x|id) and ANY labelled covariance-block syntax (1|p|id, 1+x|p|id) are explicitly rejected for Poisson mu ordinary random effects; only unlabelled independent intercepts/slopes are implemented.
Same blanket non-Gaussian REML gate; covers both the implemented independent-slope form and the already-rejected correlated/labelled forms above.

phylo(1|species,tree=tree) intercept-only. Native TMB ML/Laplace point-fit plus Rorqual SLURM job 14897050 cluster recovery (320/320 fit_ok, 0 pdHess false, 0 near-zero estimates, bias -0.021, RMSE 0.097). Recovery-only: interval_status/coverage_status remain unsupported/planned on the board.

phylo(1+x|site,tree=tree) unlabelled intercept-plus-one-slope (independent, not correlated). Native fit plus Rorqual SLURM array 14916938 (80/80 fit_ok, 0 pdHess false, 80/80 finite estimates). Recovery-only.

Representative row for q2/q4/q6/q8/q12: any labelled covariance-block or multi-slope (>1 slope variable) structured phylo mu term is rejected with "currently support only unlabelled intercept-only or one-slope structured terms." No correlated/multi-dimension count structured-mu covariance route exists for any provider.
Blanket non-Gaussian REML gate; applies identically to all five structured providers (phylo, phylo_interaction, spatial, animal, relmat) and is not repeated per-provider in this table.

phylo_interaction(1|plant:pollinator,tree1=...,tree2=...) intercept-only bipartite Kronecker block. Native fit plus Rorqual SLURM job 14918220 (80/80 fit_ok, 0 pdHess false, bias -0.027, RMSE 0.147). Recovery-only; interval/coverage unsupported.

spatial(1|site,coords=coords) intercept-only fixed-covariance kernel. Native fit plus Rorqual SLURM job 14918220 (320/320 fit_ok, 0 pdHess false, bias -0.081, RMSE 0.177). Recovery-only.
spatial(1+x|site,coords=coords) unlabelled intercept-plus-one-slope. Native fit plus Rorqual SLURM array 14916938 (80/80 fit_ok, 0 pdHess false). Recovery-only.

spatial(0+x|site,coords=coords), slope-only with NO intercept term. Admitted for Poisson only (allow_slope_only_structured_mu_types="spatial" in R/drmTMB.R:5301-5302); the identical formula on nbinom2 errors ("intercept-only or one-slope", test:585-592). Evidence is a single local debug smoke fit, not a cluster-recovery batch, hence diagnostic_only not point_fit_recovery.

evidence_source: structured-re-q-series-support-cells.tsv:qseries_count_mu_labelled_q2_rejected (cell_id name is stale/literal; layout is scalar q=1 with a label, NOT true 2x2 q=2 covariance); tests/testthat/test-count-structured-mu.R:593-623

spatial(1+x|p|site,...), a LABELLED one-slope term, is rejected even though both the unlabelled one-slope and the labelled intercept-only forms are separately admitted.

spatial(1|site,coords=coords) + (1|id) combined structured-mu-plus-ordinary-mu in one formula. Admitted for Poisson only (structured_plus_ordinary_types="spatial" in R/drmTMB.R:5295-5296), single-fit local evidence only.
